news.t: Defiance Launches AMPU: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for Amprius Technologies, Inc.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long AMPX ETF (AMPU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Amprius Technologies Inc (NYSE: AMPX), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like options and swap agreements. AMPU was launched on May 5, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches AMPU: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for Amprius Technologies, Inc.
data.text: MIAMI, May 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs today announced the launch of the Defiance Daily Target 2X Long AMPX ETF (AMPU), expanding its lineup of single-stock leveraged ETFs designed for ...
